_comment: Documentary record describing the pre-fix behavior of issue #52. Captured 2026-05-02 against D:/gameDev/pong using harness commit 185d29c. Pong's match_controller.gd and hud_presenter.gd had 4 distinct push_warning calls inserted (DIAG-A in MC._ready line 21, DIAG-B in MC._ready line 26, one in MC._on_goal_right_entered which only fires on a goal, one in HudPresenter._refresh line 19). The 30-frame issue-46 fixture (used as a convenient runner before the issue-52 request fixture existed; runId rewritten below to match the canonical issue-52 fixture) fired 3 of the 4. All 3 collapsed into ONE record showing the engine-side C++ emission point with repeatCount=3. Only the most recently captured message text survives (HudPresenter._refresh DIAG, the last one to fire); the two MC._ready messages are gone. Compare against expected-after/distinct-records.jsonl for the post-fix behavior.
